name: pact-payout-history
_note: insurance.pact-payout-history reads the caller's fired-pact payout ledger from globalThis._concordSTATE.inheritPacts.payouts — payouts from pacts they WROTE (paidOut) and splits they RECEIVED as a beneficiary (received). STATE-backed, per-user via the internal owner actor, so {} returns ok:true with empty arrays and zero totals (NEVER no_db).
